name: Context: Long-Context Memory Retrieval
description: Remember a value, process a distracting filler turn, then verify the model can still answer correctly. Tests persistent memory store and in-context retention across distractions.

turns.user: Remember that the launch codename is atlas.

Read this long note: project timeline, ownership, and milestone details repeated for context pressure. Project timeline ownership milestones repeated. Project timeline ownership milestones repeated. Project timeline ownership milestones repeated. Project timeline ownership milestones repeated.
